title: Getting Started
content:
This page introduces the project setup and folder structure.
Install Hugo Clone this repository Run hugo server

title: Part 1: The Beginning
content: Welcome to the first part of the tutorial. Here, we’ll explore advanced features and configurations.

title: Usage
content:
Learn how to use the features of this project.
hugo new posts/my-first-post.md hugo server -D
